content.claim: Admission to 6- and 8-grade gimnáziums uses a centrally administered, nationally uniform written examination in mathematics and Hungarian language (45 minutes per subject), with answer keys graded identically nationwide and annual publication by the Ministry of Education.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Procedure is formally neutral and meritocratic in design but does not address how socioeconomic factors mediate test performance
No data provided on variation in oral examination components across schools
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
